calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jul-01-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT WYLIE CARSON'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Wylie Carson's "motion to set aside default and default judgment, if entered" is ordered off calendar. Wylie purports to have his non-lawyer spouse represent him, but that is not permitted in the California courts.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR No. 7855, Email: eric.throne.csr@gmail.com, Tel: 707-305-8964 (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2008 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
